location: I-40/I-81, Knoxville, TN — pre-dawn
description: Pre-dawn dashcam through Knoxville. The road before there is any light — the trip already well underway.
now_playing: Prisoner of the Highway — Ronnie Milsap

location: I-40 West, Tennessee — foggy river crossing
description: Foggy early-morning river crossing. Low clouds sitting heavy on the water. Western Tennessee, pre-dawn.

location: I-40 West, Tennessee — foggy river crossing
description: The river crossing wide in the morning fog. Tennessee before the sun gets to it.

location: Memphis, TN — Bass Pro Shops Pyramid
description: The Pyramid on the bank of the Mississippi. Outbound pass.

location: Welcome to Oklahoma, I-40 West
description: The Welcome to Oklahoma highway sign.

location: Roland, OK
description: Roland, Oklahoma welcome sign. First state west of the Mississippi.

location: Sayre, OK — EV charging stop
description: A Gillig battery-electric bus on the other side of the charging station — being delivered to ART Arlington Transit (Arlington, VA) by Tarton Chew. Pat's first transit spot of the trip.

location: Gray County Safety Rest Area, TX
description: Pilot pizza box sitting on the hood. Dinner at the Gray County Safety Rest Area.

location: Gray County Safety Rest Area, TX
description: Beautiful sunset at Gray County Rest Area. The Texas panhandle sky doing its thing.

location: Gray County Area, TX
description: Crepuscular rays through the clouds at dusk. Texas Panhandle sky delivering.

location: I-40 West, New Mexico — approaching Albuquerque
description: Straight desert road through New Mexico. Long empty miles approaching Albuquerque.

location: I-40 West, New Mexico — west of Albuquerque
description: Dashcam through pale desert dusk west of Albuquerque.

location: I-40 West, Arizona — near Winslow
description: Dashcam catches an unidentified antique car driving the shoulder at maybe 25–30 mph. Arizona night, I-40 near Winslow.

location: Meteor Crater Rest Area, AZ — I-40 West
description: Desert rock formations at sunset. Serenity visible in the lot.

location: Meteor Crater Rest Area, AZ — I-40 West
description: Rainbow arcing over the red rock formations after sunset.

location: Meteor Crater Rest Area, AZ — I-40 West
description: Panorama: sunset burning on the left, the rainbow still holding on the right. Meteor Crater Rest Area at dusk.

location: Meteor Crater Rest Area, AZ — I-40 West
description: Poisonous snakes and insects warning sign at the rest area.

location: Meteor Crater Rest Area, AZ — I-40 West
description: Serenity sitting still in the orange dusk light. Arizona canyon country at its best.

location: I-40 West, Arizona — near Williams
description: Dashcam catches an eastbound Gillig Low Floor bus in delivery — agency unknown. Arizona, heading toward Kingman.
now_playing: Sweet Talkin' Woman — Electric Light Orchestra

location: In-N-Out Burger, Kingman, AZ
description: In-N-Out sign spotted from the highway in Kingman.

location: Millers Rest Area, NV
description: Serenity with that wall of snow-capped Sierra Nevada peaks filling the windshield. The view you drive 2,000 miles to see — and it's still bigger than expected.

location: Tonopah, NV — overnight truck stop
description: A truck across the parking lot at a truck stop. Two small dogs in the window looking out at the dark.

location: Millers Rest Area, NV
description: Serenity at the rest stop at sunset. Mountains taking the last color. The quiet out here is something.

location: Millers Rest Area, NV
description: Serenity at full crimson-orange sunset. The Nevada sky doing what it does.

location: Millers Rest Area, NV — near Tonopah
description: A kangaroo rat at Millers Rest Area. The desert still very much alive at 4am.

location: Millers Rest Area, NV
description: Clouds and open sky at Millers Rest Area. Stars where the clouds break. No trees, no branches — just sky.

location: Millers Rest Area, NV — near Tonopah
description: Brief time lapse of the night sky. The Milky Way overhead, Millers Rest Area at 4am.

location: US-6, Montgomery Pass area — CA/NV border
description: Road aimed south through the high desert toward the Sierra Nevada. The range coming into view, white-capped against the sky.

location: US-395, Owens Valley, CA — north of Bishop
description: A white water tank in the sagebrush with the Sierra Nevada behind it. The tank reads "WE MISS YOU ALREADY."

location: Barstow, CA — Victor Valley Transit
description: A Victor Valley Transit bus spotted on a frontage road from the highway near Barstow.

location: I-40 East, California — near Ludlow
description: A Gillig Low Floor battery-electric bus in delivery to Atomic City Transit (Los Alamos, NM). Caught on dashcam near Ludlow.

location: Ludlow, CA — gas stop
description: Gas pump in California. The prices out here.

location: Area 66, Yucca, AZ — Route 66
description: Area 66 — the geodesic dome visible from I-40 in Yucca, Arizona. Originally a sales office for a fraudulent land development scheme; now a UFO museum on Route 66.

location: I-40 East, Arizona — Mohave County, near Yucca
description: Dashcam eastbound on I-40 through western Arizona near Yucca. Heading back.

location: I-40 East, Arizona — near Kingman
description: Rock formations along I-40 eastbound through western Arizona. Arizona canyon country.

location: I-40 East, Arizona — near Kingman
description: Dashcam through Arizona heading east near Kingman.

location: US-89, near Cameron, AZ — heading toward Monument Valley
description: Empty two-lane road running straight into the red desert. US-89 north of Flagstaff, Monument Valley still hours ahead.

location: US-163, Kayenta, AZ — approaching Monument Valley
description: A single red butte on the horizon. The valley announcing itself from Kayenta.

location: Monument Valley Navajo Tribal Park, AZ
description: Multiple sandstone buttes. The classic formation, better than any photograph suggests.

location: Monument Valley Navajo Tribal Park, AZ
description: Tall spire of sandstone against the sky. The formations up close.

location: Monument Valley, AZ — US-163
description: The road through the valley with buttes on either side. The shot everyone takes. Still earned.

location: East & West Mitten Buttes, Monument Valley
description: The Mittens — East Mitten and West Mitten Buttes from US-163. The most photographed view in Monument Valley. Nothing prepares you for the scale.

location: US-163 heading north, San Juan County, UT
description: Road bending into a red canyon. Sandstone walls closing in. Just past Monument Valley heading north toward Mexican Hat.

location: US-163, Utah — north of Mexican Hat
description: Dashcam heading north through Utah on US-163, Monument Valley behind.
now_playing: Riders In The Sky — The Sons of the Pioneers

location: US-163, near Mexican Hat, UT
description: Winding red-rock canyon road. Rust and shadow. San Juan County, Utah.

location: US-163, near Mexican Hat, UT
description: Straight desert road with a flat-topped mesa ahead. The road home starting.

location: US-163, near Mexican Hat, UT
description: Highway with mesa in the frame. San Juan County, Utah — leaving Monument Valley country.

location: Tinker AFB, Midwest City, OK — Major Charles B. Hall Airpark
description: Static display aircraft at Tinker AFB's Major Charles B. Hall Airpark, spotted from I-40. The C-135 Stratolifter in the mix — 707 family, same bloodline as Air Force One.

location: Forrest City Rest Area, AR
description: Forrest City Rest Area on I-40, Arkansas. Stopped here on the way out too — no photo then. This is the return leg. Same parking lot, facing east.

location: Memphis, TN — I-40 Mississippi River bridge
description: I-40 bridge over the Mississippi. Memphis return crossing.

location: Memphis, TN — Mississippi River crossing
description: "Welcome to Tennessee" banner framed by bridge trusses — composed like one of those old vacation postcards.

location: Memphis, TN — Bass Pro Shops Pyramid
description: The Pyramid from the bridge, return pass. Same building, different angle — you've crossed the Mississippi twice now.

location: Buc-ee's, Crossville, TN
description: Buc-ee's in Crossville, Tennessee. The traditional stop before the mountains start.

location: I-81, northeastern Tennessee — final drive home
description: A brief video of the "Welcome to Virginia" sign. Almost home.
